items.summary: Fix the intermittent failure in the food menu display on MenuDisplay.tsx: add robust error handling and retry logic so that when the menu items query fails or returns empty, a user-friendly error state with a retry button is shown instead of a blank screen or cryptic error message.

Fix the intermittent failure in the payment options display on PaymentPage.tsx: ensure the payment QR code and payment options load reliably by adding error boundaries, retry logic on the usePaymentQRCode query, and a fallback UI when the QR code cannot be loaded.
Add a global error boundary component to catch and display unhandled React rendering errors across all pages, showing a friendly error screen with a reload option rather than a white blank screen.

Audit the backend Motoko actor's getMenuItems and getPaymentQRCode query functions to ensure they always return a valid, non-error response even under concurrent load or empty state conditions — returning empty arrays or null values rather than trapping.
